title: ShinobiOrigins
description: An addon mod for AHZNB's ShinobiCraft Mod
body:
An Addon mod for AHZNB's ShinobiCraft Mod that adds a variety of features, 
If you're wondering if something can be tweaked look at the configs most things in this are configurable via editing configs

- Features: 
  - Sharingan will go between 1-3 Tomoe then Evolve into the Mangekyo
  - Combining 2 Mangekyo of any supported type that is not tagged to the same person will result in obtainning the Eternal Mangekyo
  - Eating Zetsu Flesh will unlock the Rinnegan
  - All Sharingan/MS/Rinnegan variants can be staged up and down between sharingan -> mangekyo > rinnegan with keybinds

  - Canon and Non-Canon Mangekyo Such as
    - Itachi, Madara, Sasuke, Shisui, Izuna and more to come

  - A Kekkei Genkai Rerolling System this allows you to reroll you're current KG by using a token there is configs to tweak rates, even what item can be used for the token
  - Dojutsu Slot that allows you to wear armor on your head while using your dojutsu, getting the Danzo arm will allow you to put multiple dojutsu and switch between them

- Quality of Life Features
  - Added 2 new Jutsu to Ice release to allow you to toggle on and off the ice senbon and ice walking

Image of Mangekyo Variants
![Sharingan/MS Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2624aee57b2c87735095c52d9142a9a67ea59ee9.png)

Image of Dojutsu Slot
